subcodes.first_line: O Our Name, the Most Truthful! Thou didst quaff the choice wine of reunion when the Lord of Names was in Zawrá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمنا الاصدق قد شربت رحیق اللقاء اذ کان مالک الاسماء فی الزورآء و مره
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @presence of; reunion with God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
